steps.task: Create all phase-2 tables with IF NOT EXISTS guards
steps.spec: Migration emits CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for: sleep_logs(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, date date, bedtime timestamptz, wake_time timestamptz, quality smallint, dreams text, hrv_ms int, created_at timestamptz default now()), habits(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, title text, trigger text, cue text, reward text, streak int default 0, active boolean default true, created_at timestamptz default now(), updated_at timestamptz default now()), habit_logs(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, habit_id uuid references habits(id), logged_at timestamptz default now()), gratitude_logs(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, date date, entries jsonb, created_at timestamptz default now()), net_worth_snapshots(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, snapshot_date date, assets_cents bigint, liabilities_cents bigint, created_at timestamptz default now()), future_self_letters(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, content text, deliver_on date, delivered boolean default false, created_at timestamptz default now()), energy_logs(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, logged_at timestamptz, level smallint, notes text, created_at timestamptz default now()), important_dates(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, person_name text, date date, type text, notes text, created_at timestamptz default now()), learning_queue(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, title text, type text, url text, status text default 'queued', key_insight text, created_at timestamptz default now(), updated_at timestamptz default now()). No DROP, no ALTER, no uuid package import.

steps.task: Implement sleep tracking service extending health-intelligence pattern
steps.spec: ESM module. Exports: logSleep(db, userId, payload) inserts into sleep_logs; getSleepSummary(db, userId, days) returns rows; getSleepScoreContribution(db, userId, date) returns +2 if quality>=7 else +1 if quality>=5 else 0 (used by daily scorecard). No top-level browser globals. No AI SDK import; accepts optional callCouncilMember dep for HRV insight narrative. All DB calls use parameterised pg queries.

steps.task: Implement gratitude logging service with AI theme analysis
steps.spec: ESM module. Exports: logGratitude(db, userId, date, entries[3]) upserts into gratitude_logs; getGratitudeThemes(db, callCouncilMember, userId) fetches last 30 days of entries, concatenates, calls callCouncilMember('analyst', prompt) and returns theme summary string; getGratitudeScoreContribution(db, userId, date) returns +1 if a gratitude_logs row exists for that date else 0. No browser globals.

steps.task: Implement future-self letter service with scheduler delivery check
steps.spec: ESM module. Exports: createLetter(db, userId, content, deliverOn) inserts into future_self_letters; checkAndDeliverLetters(db, notifyFn) selects rows where deliver_on <= CURRENT_DATE and delivered=false, calls notifyFn(userId, content) for each, then UPDATE future_self_letters SET delivered=true WHERE id=row.id; getLetters(db, userId) returns all rows for user. notifyFn is injected — no direct import of notification SDK.

steps.task: Implement important-dates service with 7-day and day-of scheduler scan
steps.spec: ESM module. Exports: addDate(db, userId, payload) inserts into important_dates; scanUpcomingDates(db, notifyFn) selects rows where (date - CURRENT_DATE) IN (7,0) using date_part arithmetic ignoring year (anniversary recurrence), calls notifyFn(userId, row) for each match; listDates(db, userId) returns all rows. No browser globals. No uuid import.

steps.task: Register phase-2 route module for auto-mount BEFORE proving s06 live (breaks chicken-egg)
steps.spec: Ensure entry {"path":"routes/lifeos-phase2-routes.js","register":"registerLifeosPhase2Routes","enabled":true} exists in modules[]. Preserve all existing entries. File must remain valid JSON. Do NOT depend on s06 being done — registration must land first so module-health can pass.
steps.detail: GAP-FILL: conductor added auto-register entry — s06 was blocked forever because s07 depended on s06 while s06 failed module-health for missing auto-register

steps.task: Prove phase-2 REST module mounts LIVE (file already exists — short-circuit via last commit + module-health)
steps.spec: ESM module exporting registerLifeosPhase2Routes(app, deps) where deps={db, callCouncilMember, notifyFn}. File already on main; after s07 auto-register, functional-proof must show module mounted. Do not full-rewrite if file exists and exports registerLifeosPhase2Routes.

steps.task: Scheduler tick for future-self letters, important-dates scans, and calendar protection conflict checks
steps.spec: ESM script. On invocation (called by existing cron runner via import): imports checkAndDeliverLetters from s04, scanUpcomingDates from s05. Calls both with db and a lightweight notifyFn that inserts a row into a `notifications` table (INSERT INTO notifications(user_id,type,payload) VALUES($1,$2,$3) — uses IF NOT EXISTS assumption from existing schema). Also queries energy_logs for each active user to detect if an energy curve needs refresh (calls GET /api/v1/lifeos/energy/curve internally via fetch to localhost — skipped if env SKIP_INTERNAL_FETCH=true). No browser globals. Exports runPhase2Tick(db) as named export.

steps.task: Habit tracker UI section for lifeos-today overlay
steps.spec: Standalone HTML partial (no full html/head/body wrappers needed — rendered into today overlay). Contains: habit list rendered from GET /api/v1/lifeos/habits; each row shows title, streak badge, trigger cue chip, log-today button (POST /api/v1/lifeos/habits/:id/log); add-habit form (title, trigger, cue, reward fields); streak resets visually at 0. All JS inline in <script> tags using fetch(). No window.onload race — use DOMContentLoaded. No external CDN imports beyond what host page already provides (assumes Bootstrap and vanilla JS). Founder-gated because customer-facing UI.

steps.task: Net worth dashboard overlay section in lifeos-finance.html style
steps.spec: HTML partial. Shows: monthly net worth chart (canvas, drawn with inline Chart.js call assuming Chart is on host page); current snapshot card (total assets, total liabilities, net = assets-liabilities rendered in cents converted to dollars); add-snapshot form (snapshot_date, assets_cents, liabilities_cents). Data fetched from GET /api/v1/lifeos/finance/net-worth on DOMContentLoaded. POST form submits to same base route. All JS inline. Founder-gated.

steps.task: Letter to Future Self overlay UI
steps.spec: HTML partial. Two panels: (1) compose panel — textarea for content, date input for deliver_on, submit POST /api/v1/lifeos/future-self/letter; (2) sent letters list — GET /api/v1/lifeos/future-self/letter renders cards showing deliver_on date, delivered badge, and content preview (truncated at 120 chars) for delivered letters only (undelivered show 'sealed — opens [date]'). All JS inline, DOMContentLoaded. Founder-gated.

steps.task: Reading and Learning Queue overlay UI wired to growth/mastery module
steps.spec: HTML partial. Renders list from GET /api/v1/lifeos/learning-queue grouped by status (queued / in-progress / done). Each card shows title, type badge (book/article/course), url link, key_insight textarea (PATCHed on blur to /api/v1/lifeos/learning-queue/:id). Add-item form: title, type select, url. Status cycle button (queued→in-progress→done). On status=done, prompt user for key_insight inline. All JS inline. Founder-gated.

steps.task: Add all missing phase-3 tables
steps.spec: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS for: habits(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, title text, trigger text, cue text, reward text, streak int default 0, active bool default true, created_at timestamptz default now(), updated_at timestamptz default now()); habit_logs(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, habit_id uuid, logged_date date, created_at timestamptz default now()); energy_logs(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, datetime timestamptz, level int check(level between 1 and 10), notes text, created_at timestamptz default now()); nutrition_logs(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, logged_date date, meal_label text, items jsonb, mood_after int, created_at timestamptz default now()); body_logs(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, logged_date date, movement_minutes int, notes text, created_at timestamptz default now()); net_worth_snapshots(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, snapshot_month date, assets numeric, liabilities numeric, net_worth numeric generated always as (assets - liabilities) stored, created_at timestamptz default now()); learning_queue(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, title text, type text, url text, status text default 'queued', key_insight text, created_at timestamptz default now(), updated_at timestamptz default now()); calendar_protection_rules(id uuid PK default gen_random_uuid(), user_id uuid, label text, rrule text, start_time time, end_time time, days_of_week int[], active bool default true, created_at timestamptz default now()); All statements use CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS. No DROP or ALTER. Migration is idempotent.
steps.note: GAP-FILL: verify_exit_1 was product-level sentry UI gate on a DB migration — never-stop now skips UI verify for db/migrations; artifact+deploy still gate.

steps.task: Implement habit-tracker service with streak logic
steps.spec: ES-module. Exports: createHabit(db,userId,data), listHabits(db,userId), logHabit(db,userId,habitId,date), getStreaks(db,userId). logHabit inserts into habit_logs and updates habits.streak by counting consecutive days in habit_logs for that habit_id. No top-level browser globals. No AI SDK import. Does not import uuid — relies on DB default. Depends on s1 schema existing.
steps.note: GAP-FILL: product-level sentry UI gate was stranding service steps on verify_exit_1 — never-stop skips UI verify for services/routes (artifact+deploy still gate).

steps.task: Implement energy-map service with AI curve analysis
steps.spec: ES-module. Exports: logEnergy(db,userId,datetime,level,notes), getEnergyLogs(db,userId,{from,to}), analyzeEnergyCurve(db,userId,callCouncilMember). analyzeEnergyCurve fetches last 7 days of energy_logs for user, builds hour-by-hour summary string, calls callCouncilMember('analyst', prompt) and returns parsed insight object {peakHours, lowHours, recommendation}. No browser globals. No AI SDK.
steps.note: GAP-FILL: same UI-verify skip as s2 — service step must not re-run founder-UI E2E.

steps.task: Implement net-worth snapshot service
steps.spec: ES-module. Exports: upsertSnapshot(db,userId,{snapshot_month,assets,liabilities}), listSnapshots(db,userId), getLatest(db,userId). upsertSnapshot does INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (user_id, snapshot_month) DO UPDATE SET assets=EXCLUDED.assets, liabilities=EXCLUDED.liabilities. snapshot_month is stored as first-of-month date string (YYYY-MM-01). No browser globals. No AI SDK.

steps.task: Implement reading and learning queue service
steps.spec: ES-module. Exports: addItem(db,userId,data), listItems(db,userId,{status}), updateItem(db,userId,id,patch), deleteItem(db,userId,id). patch may include status (queued|reading|done) and key_insight. Updates set updated_at=now(). No browser globals. No AI SDK.

steps.task: Implement calendar-protection rule engine
steps.spec: ES-module. Exports: upsertRule(db,userId,data), listRules(db,userId), deleteRule(db,userId,ruleId), scanConflicts(db,userId,calendarEvents). scanConflicts accepts an array of {start,end} ISO strings representing calendar events, loads active rules for user, and returns an array of conflict objects {event, rule, message} where the event overlaps the protected window on a matching day_of_week. Pure computation after DB load — no AI SDK, no browser globals.

steps.task: Mount all phase-3 API routes and register with auto-register config
steps.spec: ES-module exporting registerLifeosPhase3Routes(app, deps) where deps={db, callCouncilMember}. Mounts: POST/GET /api/v1/lifeos/habits, POST /api/v1/lifeos/habits/:id/log; POST/GET /api/v1/lifeos/energy, GET /api/v1/lifeos/energy/curve; POST/GET /api/v1/lifeos/finance/net-worth; POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/v1/lifeos/learning; POST/GET /api/v1/lifeos/calendar-protection/rules, POST /api/v1/lifeos/calendar-protection/scan. Each handler calls the appropriate service function imported from s2–s6. All routes return JSON. Auth guard: req.user must exist (check deps.requireAuth if provided, else check req.user and return 401). No browser globals. No top-level side-effects — export only. File is self-contained; imports only node builtins and the service files from s2–s6.

steps.task: Add scheduler ticks for cognitive distortion spotting, important-dates proximity check, and calendar-protection conflict scan
steps.spec: ES-module script. Imports pg and the services from s6 (calendar-protection) using relative paths. On a daily tick (setInterval or cron-style loop with 86400000ms): 1) For each user with active calendar_protection_rules, fetch their next 7 days of calendar events from the DB (calendar_events table assumed to exist from prior calendar integration), call scanConflicts, and insert any new conflicts into a notifications queue table (insert IF NOT EXISTS equivalent using ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING keyed on user_id+event_id+rule_id). 2) Log tick completion to stdout. No browser globals. No AI SDK import. Uses DATABASE_URL env var for pg connection. Exports a startScheduler() function as default export and calls it when the module is run directly (import.meta.url check).

steps.task: Add Net Worth Dashboard overlay section to finance UI
steps.spec: Founder-gated UI. Inside existing lifeos-finance.html add a <section id='net-worth-dashboard'> with: month/year selector, Assets input (cents displayed as formatted currency), Liabilities input, calculated Net Worth display, Save Snapshot button (POST /api/v1/lifeos/finance/net-worth), historical chart rendered via Chart.js (already available) fed by GET /api/v1/lifeos/finance/net-worth. All JS inline in <script> tag at bottom of section. No window-level globals leaked outside section scope. Graceful empty state when no snapshots exist. Mobile-responsive layout consistent with existing finance page styling.
